Name: Allele
Description: Variant allele used to calculate the consequence

Name: Annotation
Description: Annotated effect using Sequence Ontology terms

Name: Annotation_Impact
Description: Putative impact: HIGH / MODERATE / LOW / MODIFIER

Name: Gene_Name
Description: Common gene name (HGNC)

Name: Gene_ID
Description: Gene ID (e.g. Ensembl ID)

Name: Feature_Type
Description: Type of feature (e.g. transcript / motif / miRNA)

Name: Feature_ID
Description: Feature identifier (e.g. Transcript ID)

Name: Transcript_BioType
Description: Transcript biotype (e.g. protein_coding)

Name: Rank
Description: Exon or intron rank / total number

Name: HGVS.c
Description: HGVS notation at DNA level

Name: HGVS.p
Description: HGVS notation at protein level

Name: cDNA.pos-cDNA.length
Description: Position in cDNA and transcript cDNA length

Name: CDS.pos-CDS.length
Description: Position and number of coding bases

Name: AA.pos-AA.length
Description: Position and number of amino acids

Name: Distance
Description: Distance to feature (upstream/downstream/intergenic)

Name: ERRORS-WARNINGS-INFO
Description: Errors or warnings or informational messages

Name: Gene_Name
Description: Gene name

Name: Gene_ID
Description: Gene ID (e.g. Ensembl ID)

Name: Number_of_transcripts_in_gene
Description: Number of transcripts in the gene

Name: Percent_of_transcripts_affected
Description: Percentage of transcripts affected by the variant
